applicability: Applies to the reported 0.5 mm, 2 mm, and 5 mm circular GaN/III-N membranes after direct CVD diamond growth under the source-paper configuration. Values must not be generalized to other membrane stacks, fixtures, reactors, or process windows without validation.
method_summary: Published measurement results transcribed from surface profilometry and Raman spectroscopy reported by Cuenca et al. No raw profilometry or Raman files are stored in this repository.
public_summary: Published profilometry and Raman measurements show increasing membrane deformation with membrane diameter, approximately 1 GPa residual tensile stress in the reported GaN/III-N membranes, and severe thermally coupled deformation and damage in the reported 5 mm membrane.
review_notes: Draft literature transcription pending final human review. This Evidence Object represents published measurement data, not an independent Diamond Thermal Lab measurement.

source.reference: arXiv:2102.09664; Cuenca et al.; Thermal stress modelling of diamond on GaN/III-Nitride membranes; 2021; published measurement transcription

title: Literature-transcribed membrane bow and residual-stress measurements
uncertainty_summary: Values and uncertainties are transcribed from the source paper. The 5 mm bow is reported as an estimated maximum net bow without a dedicated numeric uncertainty. The repository does not contain the raw measurement files.
